name: agreement_date_present
expression: agreement_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(agreement_date)) > 0
description: agreement_date is required for Property Management Agreement extraction.

name: owner_name_present
expression: owner_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(owner_name)) > 0
description: owner_name is required for Property Management Agreement extraction.

name: manager_name_present
expression: manager_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(manager_name)) > 0
description: manager_name is required for Property Management Agreement extraction.

name: property_address_present
expression: property_address IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(property_address)) > 0
description: property_address is required for Property Management Agreement extraction.

name: management_start_date_present
expression: management_start_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(management_start_date)) > 0
description: management_start_date is required for Property Management Agreement extraction.

name: management_fee_terms_present
expression: management_fee_terms IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(management_fee_terms)) > 0
description: management_fee_terms is required for Property Management Agreement extraction.

name: termination_notice_days_non_negative
description: termination_notice_days should be non-negative when present.
